title: alsophila armata
intro: Alsophila armata, also known as the New Zealand tree fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyathea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alsophila armata are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although it can also be found in some herbal supplements and topical creams.
